scripts.check:release: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm smoke:happy-path
scripts.smoke:happy-path: pnpm --filter @air-jam/server test -- --run tests/game-lifecycle.integration.test.ts tests/routing-security.integration.test.ts && pnpm smoke:browser && pnpm test:scaffold
scripts.test: pnpm --filter sdk build && pnpm --filter server test && pnpm --filter sdk test && pnpm --filter platform test
scripts.test:scaffold: pnpm --filter create-airjam build && pnpm --filter create-airjam smoke
scripts.test:scaffold:registry: pnpm --filter create-airjam build && pnpm --filter create-airjam smoke:registry
scripts.test:scaffold:tarball: pnpm --filter create-airjam build && pnpm --filter create-airjam smoke:tarball
